title: 25 Pcs Candy Cane Christmas Decorations, Red and White Plastic Candy Canes for Tree, Xmas Holiday Home Party Supplies
features: 【Christmas Candy Cane Ornament】Package includes 6 pieces of Christmas lollipop ornaments, 19 pieces of Christmas candy canes ornaments, fine to decorate your Christmas tree and create a merry Christmas atmosphere.

【Christmas Candy Canes】Cute Christmas ornaments in a lollipop shape, walking stick shape decor tool, classic red and white color fits Christmas theme well, ideal decoration choices for Christmas trees, they can bring Christmas cheer to your home.

【Premium Quality Material】The Christmas candy cane measures 4 x 15 cm, and the Christmas lollipop measures 5.5 x 13 cm. YUNSTK lollipop ornament is made of acrylic, durable and reusable, does not fade, is safe and easy to grip, ribbon for hanging up, which can hang anywhere to create a festive atmosphere.
【Festive Design】Lollipops have a small hole, easy to hang on the Christmas tree with the rope. Or pretty as gift tags, add a lively and colorful Christmas atmosphere.
【Wide Applications】You can use hang these plastic candy canes on Christmas trees, windows, walls, or any other places you like, also can be good decorations for gifts, wreaths, and coats.
